methodology_notes: Commands were executed manually by the evaluator (a Copilot agent session), NOT by a separate agent instance. This tests that the skill's commands produce correct outputs, not that an agent would follow this exact workflow.

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files after-overview.png (66004 bytes) and after-deploy-freq.png (66145 bytes) were created in v2/screenshots/. However, the git commit step was NOT executed — files were only created locally.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files named after-overview.png and after-deploy-freq.png — maps to dashboard UIDs.

assertions.description: Only post-change (after) screenshots are present — no before screenshots
assertions.evidence: No before-*.png files exist in the outputs directory.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots were taken from a real Grafana instance (docker-compose stack with seeded data). File sizes (~66KB) suggest rendered content. However, similar file sizes across different dashboards may indicate Grafana served login/error pages rather than distinct dashboard content. Visual inspection was not performed.

notes: This was a manual command execution, not an agent run. Pass rate is not meaningful for comparing with/without skill since both configurations used the same manual process.
